settings.text:
Welcome to Beg Borrow Steal Studio. By accessing our website, social media platforms, showroom, services, or purchasing any products from us, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before making a purchase.


ABOUT BEG BORROW STEAL STUDIO
Beg Borrow Steal Studio is a Mumbai-based boutique specializing in curated luxury vintage fashion, authenticated designer accessories, fine jewellery, watches, sunglasses, antiques, art objects, home curios, and rare collectibles.

We are committed to sustainable luxury through the sourcing of exceptional deadstock, vintage, and collectible pieces from private collections, auctions, estates, and trusted international sources.


PRODUCT INFORMATION & CONDITION
At Beg Borrow Steal Studio, every piece is thoughtfully sourced and carefully curated for its rarity, authenticity, craftsmanship, and enduring appeal.

Our collection includes authenticated designer treasures, vintage jewellery, handbags, watches, sunglasses, antiques, art objects, home curios, and exceptional deadstock fashion sourced through exclusive auctions, private collections, estates, and special acquisitions worldwide.

Many items offered by BBS Studio are vintage, archival, antique, collectible, or one-of-a-kind. As such, they may exhibit characteristics associated with their age, original production methods, provenance, or historical use. These qualities are considered part of the item's unique character and value.

We strive to accurately represent all items through detailed descriptions, measurements, condition notes, and photography. Variations in colour may occur due to lighting conditions and screen settings.


PRODUCT AUTHENTICITY
All designer products offered by Beg Borrow Steal Studio are represented as authentic to the best of our knowledge and expertise.

Designer items are independently authenticated through reputable third-party authentication services, including but not limited to Legit Grails, Real Authentication, and other recognized authentication providers where applicable.

Any authentication certificates, reports, or documentation provided with an item form part of the item's description.

Beg Borrow Steal Studio is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or officially connected with any luxury brand unless expressly stated.

All trademarks, logos, and brand names remain the property of their respective owners.


NATURE OF GOODS
Our inventory consists primarily of:

• Authentic vintage and collectible luxury items
• Rare deadstock pieces
• Limited-edition designer products
• Antique and collectible objects
• Vintage jewellery and watches
• Curated home décor and curiosities

Many items are unique and cannot be replaced.

Due to the nature of vintage, antique, and collectible goods, signs of age, patina, historical wear, or manufacturing variations may be present and are considered part of the item's character and value unless otherwise specified. These characteristics are not considered defects.

We make every effort to accurately photograph and describe each item.


PRODUCT DESCRIPTIONS
We strive to ensure all descriptions, dimensions, materials, provenance information, photographs, and condition reports are accurate.

However:

• Colours may vary due to screen settings and photography.
• Measurements may contain minor variations.
• Historical or provenance information may be based on available documentation and research.
• Vintage and antique items may exhibit characteristics consistent with age and craftsmanship.

Customers are encouraged to request additional photographs or information before purchasing.


PRICING
All prices are listed in Indian Rupees (INR) unless otherwise stated.

Prices may be changed without prior notice.

Taxes, duties, customs charges, shipping costs, insurance fees, and handling charges may be applied separately where applicable.

The Studio reserves the right to correct pricing errors at any time.


ORDERS AND ACCEPTANCE
All orders are subject to availability and acceptance.

We reserve the right to:

• Refuse or cancel any order.
• Limit quantities purchased.
• Request additional verification prior to shipment.
• Cancel transactions suspected of fraud, misuse, or unauthorized activity.

An order is considered accepted only after payment has been received and confirmation has been issued by the Studio.

PAYMENT
Full payment must be received before any order is processed or shipped.

By placing an order, you confirm that the payment method used is valid and that you are authorized to use it.


SHIPPING & DELIVERY
We aim to dispatch all orders within the timeframe stated on the website.

Delivery estimates are provided for guidance only and are not guaranteed. We are not responsible for delays caused by courier services, weather conditions, public holidays, or other circumstances beyond our control.

Risk and ownership pass to the customer upon successful delivery.


SALES & RETURNS POLICY
Due to the exclusive, collectible, and often one-of-a-kind nature of our inventory, all sales are final.

We encourage clients to review product descriptions, measurements, condition notes, and photographs carefully before completing a purchase.

Returns or exchanges will only be considered if:
• The item received differs materially from the product description; or
• The item is damaged in transit.

Any claim must be submitted within 48 hours of delivery and accompanied by supporting photographs and documentation.

Items approved for return must be returned in the same condition in which they were received.


INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All content on this website, including text, photography, graphics, branding, product descriptions, logos, and design elements, is the property of Beg Borrow Steal Studio and may not be copied, reproduced, distributed, or used without prior written consent.


LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
To the fullest extent permitted by law, Beg Borrow Steal Studio shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of this website or the purchase of any products.

Our liability shall not exceed the purchase price of the item in question.


GOVERNING LAW
These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of India.

Any dispute arising from the use of this website or purchases made through it shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Mumbai, Maharashtra.


CONTACT
For enquiries regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact:

Beg Borrow Steal Studio
Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
begborrowstealstudio@gmail.com
